headline: Bioclate (Armour: Baxter International) Market Research Report 2026: Epidemiology, Pipeline Analysis, Trends, Strategies, & Forecasts, 2020-2025, 2025-2030F, 2035F
summary: Major opportunities in the bioclate (Armour) market include personalized hemophilia care growth, expanding home infusion programs, and increased access in emerging markets. Rising hemophilia diagnosis rates and long-term therapy adherence also drive demand, while tariffs prompt localized production of recombinant therapies.Dublin, March 10, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- The "Bioclate (Armour) Market Report 2026: Epidemiology, Pipeline Analysis, Market Insights & Forecasts" has been added to ResearchA
